name: File Download from Suspicious URL using GfxDownloadWrapper
description: Detects file downloads from suspicious (non-standard) URLs using GfxDownloadWrapper.exe. Intel Graphics Executable Download Wrapper (GfxDownloadWrapper) is a legitimate application for updating graphics card modules, downloading JSON files from https://gameplayapi.intel.com. Adversaries may abuse its functionality to download files from other, non-standard URLs. This rule specifically excludes the legitimate use case and flags deviations.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the DNS query event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for DNS Query (22).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process making the DNS query, which should be 'GfxDownloadWrapper.exe'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute GfxDownloadWrapper.exe.

parameters.name: query_name
parameters.description: The domain name being queried by GfxDownloadWrapper.exe (expected to be non-Intel).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which GfxDownloadWrapper.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
